task_completion.description: Correct the data type for 'bmi' in api/schemas.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing api/schemas.py open in an editor with the 'bmi' field defined as a float (or appropriate numeric type) instead of an incorrect type.

task_completion.description: Implement correct feature scaling and array shapes for numerical features in api/preprocessing.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of api/preprocessing.py showing StandardScaler applied to 'age', 'bmi', and 'heart_rate', along with correct array reshaping (e.g., .reshape(1, -1)).

task_completion.description: Implement correct categorical encoding for 'blood_type' in api/preprocessing.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of api/preprocessing.py showing One-Hot Encoding logic applied to the 'blood_type' feature.

task_completion.description: Optimize the model loading process in api/app.py to prevent memory leaks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of api/app.py showing the model loading function (e.g., joblib.load) moved outside the endpoint function (loaded globally or on startup) rather than loading the model on every API request.

task_completion.description: Verify the fixes by running pytest tests/test_api.py.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of 'pytest tests/test_api.py' with all tests passing (e.g., green text, 'passed' status).

integrity.description: The agent used a real text editor or IDE to modify the Python files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the files (schemas.py, preprocessing.py, app.py) being edited in an IDE (like VS Code) or terminal editor (like nano/vim), not just echoing text to files without viewing them.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely ran the pytest command in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows the actual pytest command typed and the standard pytest output format, rather than a mocked or manually printed success message.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify the test file to force a pass.
integrity.visual_evidence: The test file 'tests/test_api.py' is not shown being edited or modified to remove assertions or hardcode passing conditions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves debugging a FastAPI app predicting hospital readmission risk. Key fixes include: 1) Changing 'bmi' data type to float in schemas.py. 2) Applying StandardScaler to 'age', 'bmi', and 'heart_rate' and One-Hot Encoding to 'blood_type' in preprocessing.py. 3) Moving the scikit-learn Random Forest model loading (joblib.load) outside the request handler in app.py to fix the memory leak. The final verification is running pytest tests/test_api.py which must pass.
